column6: The whole LCSC cart can be downloaded on the Github. (So you can see and add all the items).
column14: PLEASE USE THE .XLSX BOM (IT LOOKS MUCH BETTER AND HAS CLICKABLE LINKS).

column6: Since 1. July 2026 there will be a new Category Flat Fee, affecting all EU residents, for each category  (HS Code) of items there will be a flat
fee of 3€, the HS Codes for this package are:  HS853224, HS853321, HS853400, HS853669, HS850450, HS854121, HS854141, and HS854231.
Which is 8*3€ or 24€ (28$). This fee will be added automatically when
checking out (starting on 1.7.2026). But if I order a package on the 20.6. and the package will arrive to the borders in July I will
still need to pay the fees. THIS IS NOT A  LOCAL/POST OR A COUNTRY FEE!!!
